volatility.description: How likely lane 1 is to lose (higher = more upsets)
volatility.adviceHigh: Lane 1 is likely to lose here, so the Upset Focus model targeting high payouts is recommended
volatility.adviceLow: Lane 1 is stable here, so the accuracy-focused Safe Bet model is recommended
volatility.adviceMedium: A typical race, so the balanced Standard model is recommended

table.title: AI Data Predictions
table.guideNationalWinRate: The racer's nationwide win rate. 6.0+ is A-class level.
table.guideNationalTop2Rate: Probability of finishing in the top 2. Shows betting relevance.
table.guideLocalWinRate: Win rate at this venue. Shows venue affinity.
table.guideMotorTop2Rate: The motor's top-2 rate. 40%+ is a good sign.
table.guideAvgST: Average start timing. Smaller means a faster start.
table.guideExhibitionTime: Straight-line time in exhibition. Smaller means a stronger motor.
table.guideExhibitionST: Start timing in exhibition. Smaller means better start ability.
table.guideTotalPower: Overall strength index from ST advantage and motor performance.
table.guideCourseWinRate: Past wins and starts from this course.

panel.officialLink: View race info on the official site
panel.venueGuideDesc: Detailed venue characteristics and betting angles

home.fetchErrorDesc: Failed to fetch data. Check your network connection and try again later.
home.noRacesToday: No races at this venue today
home.blogDesc: Prediction tips, venue guides, and data analysis to boost your win rate
home.disclaimer: * This site provides AI-generated prediction information and does not guarantee results

errors.noPredictionData: Prediction data for this race has not been generated yet. Please try again later.
errors.noModelData: No prediction data found for this model.

updateStatus.refreshTooltip: Clear browser cache and reload data

outcomePreview.title: Reference: Winning patterns when lane {{boat}} finishes 1st
outcomePreview.noData: No pattern data for this lane

modelDesc.safeBetFeature: Conservative picks based on the most likely first-mark pattern
modelDesc.safeBetFactors: Lane-1 advantage, A-class racers, Nige/Sashi probabilities
modelDesc.safeBetSuited: Solid races where boat 1 or A-class racers are strong
modelDesc.safeBetRecommend: You value hit rate and steady wins
modelDesc.standardFeature: Balanced picks based on the second most likely pattern
modelDesc.standardFactors: National win rate, local record, and motor performance combined
modelDesc.standardRecommend: You want steady hits with moderate payouts
modelDesc.upsetFeature: High-payout picks based on the third most likely pattern
modelDesc.upsetFactors: Makuri/Makuri-zashi probabilities, strong motors, outer lanes
modelDesc.upsetSuited: Chaotic races where upsets are likely
modelDesc.upsetRecommend: You want big payouts and dramatic wins
modelDesc.hint: Each model corresponds to a different first-mark pattern. Switching models also changes the animation pattern.

attackDefense.title: Advanced Race Data
attackDefense.exampleDefenseDesc: → In {{total}} starts from lane 1, lost to another racer's "{{attackLabel}}" {{count}} times
attackDefense.exampleAttackDesc: → In {{total}} starts from lane {{course}}, won with "{{label}}" {{count}} times
attackDefense.supplementDefault: … national average (shown when personal data is insufficient)
attackDefense.supplementReference: … reference data (small sample size, may be less accurate)
